questionHtml:
The half-life of a radioactive nuclide is 8.0 s. The initial activity of a pure sample of the nuclide is 10 000 Bq. What is the approximate activity of the sample after 4.0 s?

A. 2500 Bq

B. 5000 Bq

C. 7100 Bq

D. 7500 Bq

meta.title: The half-life of a radioactive nuclide is 8.0 s. The initial activity of a pure sample of the nuclide is 10 000 Bq. What is the approximate activity of the sample after 4.0 s? A. 2
